description.unified: Charges a total of 2 time(s). On the first attack, moves behind the enemy and deals ATK as Physical DMG, knocking them down for 1sec [1.8 sec->1sec]. On the second attack, moves behind the enemy with the highest ATK, dealing ATK as Physical DMG, knocking them down for 1sec [1.8 sec->1sec], and increasing Physical DMG taken by 20% [30%->20%] for 4sec.

Removes all negative effects from self and grants all allies [Reading the Wind] for 7sec [10 sec->7sec], increasing ATK by 302*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Evasion by 300 [350->300]. If a target under [Reading the Wind] successfully evades, all allies’ Crit DMG is increased by 2% [3%->2%] for 7sec [10 sec->7sec]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
Attacks enemies in a circular area around you, dealing ATK as Physical DMG and stunning them for 1.8sec. This skill gains an additional 800 [500->800] Physical Defense Penetration.

On Normal Attack, has a 20% [15%->20%] chance to deal ATK as additional Physical DMG, stunning the target for 0.5sec [0.6 sec->0.5sec], and increasing Physical DMG taken by 15% for 5sec. [(added) increasing Physical DMG taken by 15%; (removed) reducing their Physical Defense by 25%]. This skill ignores the target’s damage reduction effects.

IV.unified: Stuns damaged enemies for 1 sec [3 sec->1 sec].

dark.unified: On each attack, reduces the target’s Mana by 250 [400->250].
Reduces the target’s Healing Effectiveness by 20% [40%->20%] for 7 sec [6 sec->7 sec].

light.unified: Cooldown of all skills is reduced by 2 sec. [(removed) Normal Attack damage is increased by 25%].

dark.unified: At the start of battle, increases Defense Penetration by 400 for 10 sec [2 sec->10 sec] and grants immunity to status ailments for 5 sec. The Defense Penetration increase cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: [Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by 5% [10%->5%], and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target's Max HP.

dark.unified: On Normal Attack, increases Attack by 3% and Physical Evasion Chance by 35 [30->35] for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: On hit, increases the target's Physical Damage taken by {0}% and reduces Status Ailment Resistance by 100 [{1}->100] for {1} sec [10 sec->{1} sec]. If the target is a boss, damage dealt to the boss is increased by {4}% [{2}%->{4}%], and this boss damage increase effect stacks up to 10 times.
